hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams centralize alert escalation, preserve audit evidence, and streamline suspicious activity reviews within internal reporting workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Internal reporting slows with manual processes
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and errors when internal AML reporting depends on disconnected tools and manual data aggregation. This creates gaps in audit-ready evidence and weakens traceability between alerts, cases and final reports.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates alerts, case workflows, reviewer actions and evidence into a unified reporting layer that streamlines internal AML report drafting while preserving full audit traceability.
workflow_description: SFTY organizes compliance alerts through structured reviews, case creation, evidence preservation and internal reporting to streamline audit-ready AML workflows for VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Clear internal reporting
why_sfty_description: SFTY bridges fragmented AML outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence to automate internal reporting while preserving compliance team control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by preserving audit-ready evidence and orchestrating provider outputs within a governed, scalable environment for reliable compliance reporting.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, case management, decisions, regulatory rules and reporting to streamline compliance operations for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate internal reporting?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures alerts, provider checks and case data into automated internal report drafts while preserving human review and decision control throughout the process.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages to provide a clear, audit-ready trail supporting compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect outputs within a single compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into one structured, auditable workflow enabling efficient compliance operations and reporting.
final_title: Structure internal reporting workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, cases, regulatory updates and evidence to support controlled AML reporting workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
